2605.28703.title: A Fresh Look at Lamarckian Evolution and the Baldwin Effect
2605.28703.paper_summary: Baldwinian and Lamarckian evolution have existed for a long time in evolutionary algorithms (EAs) without ever dominating the academic literature or practical applications. In this work, we use modern empirical and theoretical methods to revisit Lamarckian and Baldwinian evolution and rigorously compare them with the generic Darwinian evolution. On the empirical side, we run a comprehensive suite of experiments on graphs from six different datasets from the recent GraphBench benchmark on Maximum Independent Set and Maximum Cut problems. Our results show that Baldwinian and Lamarckian evolution consistently outperform Darwinian evolution, confirming the great potential of local search augmented evolutionary algorithms. Notably, in the great majority of cases, all EAs outperform recent deep learning baselines and approach the performance of highly specialised heuristic and exact solvers. We furthermore report a high-performing set of generalist parameters for all studied evolution types that we hope will be of use to practitioners in future. On the theoretical side, we extend the existing Deceptive Leading Block benchmark to arbitrary block length and use tools from modern theoretical runtime analysis to prove upper and lower bounds on the expected runtime. For block lengths greater than two, Baldwinian evolution is asymptotically faster than Lamarckian which is asymptotically faster than Darwinian evolution. When accounting for the cost of the local search procedure in fitness evaluations, the ordering depends on the implementation with Baldwinian evolution staying fastest from small block lengths onwards, explaining its strong empirical performance.
2605.28703.paper_summary_zh: 巴爾德溫進化和拉馬克進化在進化算法（EAs）中已存在很長一段時間，但從未主導學術文獻或實際應用。在這項工作中，我們使用現代的實證和理論方法重新檢視拉馬克進化和巴爾德溫進化，並嚴謹地將它們與一般的達爾文進化進行比較。在實證方面，我們在來自最近的 GraphBench 基準的六個不同數據集的圖上進行了一系列全面的實驗，針對最大獨立集和最大切割問題。我們的結果顯示，巴爾德溫進化和拉馬克進化始終超越達爾文進化，確認了增強局部搜索的進化算法的巨大潛力。值得注意的是，在絕大多數情況下，所有的 EAs 都超越了最近的深度學習基準，並接近高度專業化的啟發式和精確求解器的性能。我們還報告了一組高效的通用參數，適用於所有研究的進化類型，希望未來能對實踐者有所幫助。在理論方面，我們將現有的欺騙性領導塊基準擴展到任意塊長，並使用現代理論運行時間分析的工具來證明期望運行時間的上界和下界。對於塊長大於二的情況，巴爾德溫進化的漸進速度快於拉馬克進化，而拉馬克進化則漸進速度快於達爾文進化。當考慮到在適應度評估中局部搜索過程的成本時，排序取決於實現，巴爾德溫進化在小塊長度以上始終保持最快，解釋了其強大的實證表現。
2605.28703.author: Inès Benito et.al.
2605.28703.authors: Inès Benito, Johannes F. Lutzeyer, Benjamin Doerr
